---
title: "Phenotype methods timeline"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Phenotype methods timeline}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 7,
  dpi = 96
)
```

```{r setup}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtimeline)
data("phenotype_methods_timeline")
```

Validate input columns before plotting:

```{r}
ggtimeline_data(phenotype_methods_timeline, date = "date", label = "topic")
```

```{r demo, fig.alt = "Ribbon timeline of phenotype mapping methods"}
eras <- data.frame(
  start = as.Date(c("2020-07-01", "2023-01-01", "2025-01-01")),
  end   = as.Date(c("2022-12-31", "2024-12-31", "2026-12-31")),
  label = c("Emergence", "Expansion", "Acceleration"),
  fill  = c("#4C72B0", "#55A868", "#C44E52")
)

ggtimeline(
  phenotype_methods_timeline,
  aes(x = date, label = topic, fill = category, shape = status),
  year_breaks = "1 year",
  year_side = "inside",
  year_lines = 1,
  eras = eras,
  show_points = TRUE,
  base_height = 1.2,
  height_step = 0.9,
  label_size = 3.2
) +
  scale_timeline_fill(name = "Method category") +
  scale_timeline_shape(name = "Publication status") +
  labs(title = "Phenotype mapping methods")
```
